"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

Sandboxed agents could escape exec routing via host=node override.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `>= 2026.4.5 < 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

A sandboxed agent could request `host: "node"` and route exec to a remote node instead of the intended sandbox execution path, bypassing the sandbox routing boundary.

## Technical Details

The fix blocks sandboxed exec escape to remote node targets and keeps routing aligned with the active sandbox policy.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #63880. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `dffad08529202edbf34e4808788e1182fe10f6a9`
- PR: #63880

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00347, "percentile": 0.26585}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:14:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42434"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:14:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63880", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/dffad08529202edbf34e4808788e1182fe10f6a9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42434", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-sandbox-escape-via-host-parameter-override-in-exec-routing", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Sandboxed agents could escape exec routing via host=node override", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:32:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-736r-jwj6-4w23", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.4.5, < 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
